hindi: जय गोपाल जय नंदलाल। ग्वालों के साथ खेलत बाल॥
english: Victory to Gopala, victory to Nandlala; the child playing with cowherds
roman: Jai Gopal Jai Nandlal, Gwalon Ke Saath Khelat Bal

hindi: गोपी गोकुल वृंदावन स्वामी। यमुना तट पर खेलत नामी॥
english: Lord of the gopis and Vrindavan; famously playing on the banks of the Yamuna
roman: Gopi Gokul Vrindavan Swami, Yamuna Tat Par Khelat Nami

hindi: माखन चोर, मुरली बजाते। ग्वालों संग रास खेलाते॥
english: Butter-stealer, flute-player; performing the Rasa dance with cowherds
roman: Makhan Chor Murli Bajate, Gwalon Sang Raas Khelaate

hindi: गोवर्धन उठाया एक हाथ से। कालिया नाग नाचा पैर से॥
english: He lifted Govardhan with one hand; the Kaliya serpent danced at his feet
roman: Govardhan Uthaya Ek Haath Se, Kaliya Naag Nacha Pair Se

hindi: गोपाल की लीला अनंत। भक्त जन करते नित्य जयंत॥
english: The deeds of Gopala are infinite; devotees celebrate him every day
roman: Gopal Ki Leela Anant, Bhakt Jan Karte Nitya Jayant

hindi: गोपाल चालीसा जो पढ़े। हृदय में कृष्ण प्रेम बढ़े॥
english: Whoever reads the Gopala Chalisa; Krishna's love grows in the heart
roman: Gopal Chalisa Jo Padhe, Hriday Mein Krishna Prem Badhe

hindi: जय जय गोपाल कृष्ण मुरारी। राधा संग रास रचाते भारी॥
english: Victory to Gopala Krishna Murari; performing the great Rasa dance with Radha
roman: Jai Jai Gopal Krishna Murari, Radha Sang Raas Rachate Bhaari
